caption: A man wearing a green t-shirt and a green baseball cap sits in a studio setting, speaking into a black microphone. Behind him is a backdrop with the text "UNIQUE FASHIONS" and a logo for "VIM VIRTUAL REALITY." To his right, another person is partially visible, wearing a blue garment. The man gestures with his hand as he talks, and his expression remains engaged across the sequence. In front of him is a desk with a sign that reads "BOSSES TALK" and "CUT IT CONNECT JOIN US." A small circular logo is visible in the lower-left corner of the scene, and a red logo reading "STAR TALK" appears on the lower right. The scene remains static in terms of composition, with the only movement being the man's speech and hand gestures as the sequence progresses.
